title: Writing - Part 2
description: Choose one of the following writing tasks and write your answer in 140-190 words.

tasks.title: Article
tasks.prompt:
You see this notice in an English-language travel magazine:

'We want articles from our readers about a place you have visited that you will never forget. What made it so special? Would you recommend it to others?'

Write your article.
tasks.modelAnswer:
A Place I Will Never Forget: Lisbon, Portugal

If you are looking for a city that combines history, beauty, and incredible food, look no further than Lisbon. I visited last summer and it has remained in my heart ever since.

Lisbon is a city of contrasts. You can wander through medieval alleyways lined with colourful tiles in the Alfama district and then, minutes later, find yourself in a modern rooftop bar watching the sunset over the River Tagus. The sheer variety of experiences is what makes it so memorable.

The food is another highlight that deserves special mention. From the famous pastéis de nata — warm custard tarts dusted with cinnamon — to fresh grilled fish by the waterfront, every meal felt like an event.

Perhaps the best thing about Lisbon is how welcoming and relaxed the locals are. You never feel like a tourist being rushed along; instead, the city invites you to slow down and enjoy life.

If you get the chance to visit, do not hesitate. Lisbon will enchant you.

tasks.title: Review
tasks.prompt:
You see this notice on a travel website:

'Have you stayed in a hotel, hostel, or holiday accommodation that impressed or disappointed you? Write a review describing your experience and telling other travellers whether you would recommend it.'

Write your review.
tasks.modelAnswer:
Review: Coastal Breeze Hostel, Barcelona

Travelling on a student budget in Barcelona, I chose Coastal Breeze Hostel based on its glowing online ratings. I am pleased to say those ratings are well deserved.

Located just ten minutes from the beach and easily accessible by metro, the hostel's position is ideal for tourists. The rooms are clean and simply furnished, with comfortable bunk beds and reliable air conditioning — essential in Barcelona's summer heat.

What truly sets Coastal Breeze apart is its social atmosphere. Every evening, staff organise free events such as tapas-making classes, walking tours, and film nights on the rooftop terrace. These activities make it extremely easy to meet other travellers from around the world.

The only minor criticism is that the shared bathrooms can get busy in the mornings, so early risers have an advantage.

For solo travellers or anyone wanting an affordable yet social experience in Barcelona, Coastal Breeze is an excellent choice. It offers great value for money and creates memories that last long after you have returned home. Highly recommended.

tasks.title: Email
tasks.prompt:
Your English-speaking friend Chris is planning a trip to your country and has asked you to recommend places to visit and things to do. Write an email giving Chris your recommendations, explaining why you have chosen them, and offering any useful travel tips.

Write your email to Chris.
tasks.modelAnswer:
Hi Chris,

How exciting that you're coming to visit! I've been thinking about what to recommend and I have a few suggestions that I'm sure you'll love.

First of all, you absolutely must visit the old town. It's the historic heart of the city and is full of beautiful architecture, hidden cafés, and interesting museums. I'd recommend spending at least a full day there. Don't miss the cathedral — the view from the top is spectacular.

If you enjoy nature, a day trip to the mountains is a must. The scenery is breathtaking, especially in spring, and there are excellent hiking trails for all levels. Just make sure you wear comfortable shoes!

For food, skip the tourist restaurants near the main square and head to the market instead. The local street food is far cheaper and much more delicious.

One final tip: try to learn a few basic phrases in the local language. People really appreciate the effort and it makes the whole experience much more rewarding.

Can't wait to see you!
All the best,
Eva
